_readme: Master network interlink config. Lives in astro-gateway-master. Copied to every site clone. Never add footer links - all links must be contextual in-body only.

productivityNarrative.universalAngle: Every product in this network addresses a different bottleneck in the same problem: professionals and businesses spending too much time on documentation, administration, and manual processes instead of their actual work.
productivityNarrative.conclusionBridgeTemplate: Professionals who get the most value from {THIS_PRODUCT} often find that addressing {ADJACENT_PROBLEM} compounds the time saving significantly.

rules._note: No footer links. All links must be contextual - woven naturally into body copy or conclusion paragraphs.

internal.anchorVariation: required - never repeat same anchor text to same destination within same site

external.anchorVariation: required - track used anchors in link-usage.json, never repeat
